ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phenology_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the observation */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the observation */,
  "doy" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-365) */,
  "bbch_code" INTEGER /* BBCH code representing the growth stage */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the crops table */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenology_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenology_data_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenology_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenology_data_bbch_code FOREIGN KEY ("bbch_code") REFERENCES bbch_scale ("bbch_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Common name of the crop */,
  "crop_family" TEXT /* Family to which the crop belongs */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop was harvested */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bbch_scale" (
  "bbch_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BBCH code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth stage */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the crops table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbch_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bbch_scale_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or area name */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded on that date */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall recorded on that date */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded on that date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded on that date */,
  "sunlight_duration" REAL /* Sunlight duration recorded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenology data entry accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES phenology_data ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, finalized, etc.) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups with whom the report was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
